news.summary: TELUS Digital (NYSE: TIXT) will unveil its Q1 2025 results on May 9, 2025, prior to North American market opening, accompanied by a conference call at 10:00 a.m. (ET) / 7:00 a.m. (PT). During the call, management will assess the performance, engage in a Q&A with select analysts. The event will be webcasted on the TELUS Digital Investor Relations site at www.telusdigi.
news.headline: TELUS Digital (NYSE and TSX: TIXT) to release Q1 2025 results on May 9, with an investor call at 10am ET/7am PT.

news.summary: Partners Value Investments Inc. disclosed that the non-voting exchangeable shares, under the symbol “PVF.A”, are set to start trading on the TSX Venture Exchange on April 17, 2025. The Exchangeable Shares have been designated with CUSIP number 70214W104 and ISIN number CA70214W1041, with TSX Trust Company serving as the transfer agent. PVII (TSXV: PVF.WT) made the announcement in Toronto on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Partners Value Investments to list Exchangeable Shares (PVF.A) on TSXV from April 17, 2025; CUSIP: 70214W104; ISIN: CA70214W1041. TSX Trust Company is transfer agent.

news.summary: A report from crypto market maker Wintermute noted that Bitcoin has shown resilience in the face of macroeconomic challenges, holding up well compared to traditional financial markets. While the S&P 500 and Nasdaq dropped to yearly lows and bond yields surged, Bitcoin saw a modest decline, reaching levels similar to the US election period. This shift is attributed to growing institutional interest and Bitcoin being viewed as digital gold due to its decentralization. Bitcoin's price rose by 7% to $83,700 over the past week as inflation showed signs of cooling off. However, Wintermute warns that global trade tensions could lead to increased inflation risks. Analysts predict that Trump's trade policies may create turmoil and financial crises, ultimately driving greater adoption of Bitcoin. Trade wars heighten the risk of inflation and economic slowdown, with predictions of a 61% chance of a US recession this year. Wintermute cautions that the trend of Bitcoin's resilience may soon reverse.
news.headline: Bitcoin's resilience shines amidst market downturn, with BTC holding up well while others drop. Bitcoin price reaches $86K. Influence from institutional interest and digital gold narrative at play. Bitcoin to remain strong in face of global tensions. US recession odds at 61%. Market turmoil expected.

news.summary: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. (Kolibri) based in Thousand Oaks, California, will be announcing its financial and operating outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 on May 14, 2025. The results will be disclosed before the market opens. The company, listed on TSX as KEI and NASDAQ as KGEI, is set to conduct an earnings call for investors and analysts on the same day at 9:00 a.m. This development forms part of the corporate update regarding upcoming events.
news.headline: Kolibri Global Energy Inc. (TSX: KEI, NASDAQ: KGEI) to release Q1 2025 results on May 14. Conference call at 9:00 am.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Bank of America revealed its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 15th. Interested parties can find the detailed information, including the news release, supplemental filing, and investor presentation on Bank of America's Investor Relations website.
news.headline: Bank of America's Q1 2025 financial results released with details available on Investor Relations website.

news.summary: Brazil Potash Corp., a mineral exploration company with the Autazes Project in Brazil, revealed that its subsidiary Potássio do Brasil Ltda. has granted a contract for wildlife rescue to Ecology Suporte Ambiental e Engenharia. This announcement was made on April 15, 2025. The parent company trades on the NYSE-American under the symbol GRO.
news.headline: Brazil Potash progresses Autazes Project with fauna rescue contract signed - partnering with Ecology Suporte.

news.summary: In Kazakhstan, the upcoming Games of the Future 2026 is expected to be the largest season yet. The World Phygital Community (WPC) has revealed the schedule for the 2025/2026 ranking tournament season, where athletes and clubs will compete for spots in the Games. This season is anticipated to attract record numbers of participants and spectators.
news.headline: World Phygital Community reveals 2025/2026 global qualifying tournament season leading up to Games of the Future 2026 in Kazakhstan. #sports #athletes #tournament

news.summary: Irving, Texas - Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) announced that D. James Umpleby III, the CEO for eight years and with nearly 45 years of service, will assume the role of Executive Chairman of the Board starting on May 1. Umpleby III will be succeeded by Joseph E. Creed, who has served as the Chief Operating Officer for 28 years.
news.headline: Caterpillar CEO Umpleby to become Executive Chairman; COO Creed elected as next CEO. Umpleby served 8 years and 45 years of service.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, International Game Technology PLC (IGT) announced they will be holding a conference call and live webcast on Tuesday, May 13, 2025, to discuss their first quarter 2025 results for the period ending on March 31, 2025. The call is scheduled for 8:00 AM on that day. This event is significant as it provides stakeholders with the opportunity to gain insights into the company's performance during this crucial period. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in this event to better understand IGT's financial standing.
news.headline: IGT plc will host Q1 2025 results conference call on May 13, 2025. Period ended Mar 31, 2025.

news.summary: After a surge of over 10,000 complaints, AskGamblers has refunded approximately $7 million to affected players, according to the 2024 Complaint Service report. The report was released in April 2025 from BELGRADE, Serbia.
news.headline: AskGamblers returned close to $7 million to players in 2024 from 10,000+ complaints, according to their latest report.

news.summary: In San Juan, Puerto Rico, as of April 15, 2025, Flagship Honda is offering the 2025 Honda Ridgeline, providing drivers with a unique combination of toughness and luxury. The dealership is excited to introduce the robust and stylish 2025 Honda Ridgeline to customers in the area.
news.headline: Customers in San Juan, Puerto Rico can now buy the 2025 Honda Ridgeline at Flagship Honda, offering rugged capability and refined comfort. 90 characters.

news.summary: BISMARCK, N.D.--Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF), a company specializing in construction materials and contracting services, is set to conduct a conference call to discuss its earnings for the first quarter of 2025. The call is scheduled for 11 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, with financial results being unveiled before the NYSE market opens that morning. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the call and presentation slides on the Knife River website in the Investors section.
news.headline: Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF) to host Q1 conference call on May 6, 2025, after financial results release.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.7%, with a total of 10.7 million people currently unemployed. This increase is attributed to the ongoing economic challenges facing various industries. Additionally, there has been a 3.2% decrease in the GDP for the current quarter, marking a significant downturn in the country's economic performance. Experts are expressing concerns about the future outlook and urging for swift action to address these pressing issues. The government has announced plans to implement new initiatives to stimulate economic growth and job creation in response to these alarming statistics.
news.headline: Yields on 10-year Treasuries stagnate as term premium hits 10-year peak.

news.summary: Kinross Gold Corporation (TSX: K; NYSE: KGC) reported today that a mill fire took place at Tasiast on April 14, 2025, necessitating a temporary halt in mill operations. The fire has been completely put out, and no injuries were documented. Mining activities are proceeding as scheduled despite the incident.
news.headline: Kinross Gold Corp suspends mill ops at Tasiast after fire on Apr 14, 2025. No injuries reported. Mining on track.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST) revealed their plan to release financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, known for producing high-performance lidar sensors for various industries, will announce the figures after market hours on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Following this disclosure, a conference call is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET to delve into the results further. Those interested can sign up for the webcast by visiting.
news.headline: Ouster (Nasdaq: OUST) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Amid the escalating trade war, China has mandated a suspension of Boeing jet deliveries. This decision comes following a series of trade tensions between the two economic giants. Notably, China has ordered a cessation of Boeing aircraft deliveries, affecting a significant number of orders and potentially influencing the broader market. This move underscores the growing impact of the trade dispute on various industries, particularly the aviation sector.
news.headline: China halts Boeing jet deliveries amid trade war escalation. Stay informed with Bloomberg The Pulse on 04/15.

news.summary: The article discusses the current state of Bitcoin (BTC) based on the relative strength index (RSI) as a key leading indicator. The RSI for BTC has reached its highest levels since January, indicating potential price gains for the cryptocurrency. The daily RSI shows signs of a bullish divergence, with BTC making higher lows and breaking above the 50 midpoint. Analysts, including Rekt Capital and Kevin Svenson, are optimistic about a BTC price rebound, with potential support levels around $70,000. However, macroeconomic conditions, including the US trade war and risk-asset rout, may pose challenges for BTC's performance. Despite these concerns, factors like record global M2 money supply and a weakening US dollar index suggest potential bullish trends for BTC in the future. The article stresses that readers should conduct their own research before making any investment decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin's RSI highs signal potential price gains, as indicators hint at a breakout; Weekly RSI also shows promising signs with $70K as a floor. Mixed views on Bitcoin's performance amid macroeconomic conditions, with April showing underwhelming results.
Next shutdown of TikTok expected to last longer, reports indicate. #TikTokShutdown

news.summary: In New York today, Academy Securities, the first investment bank owned and operated by Post-9/11 veterans in the nation, revealed the appointment of Gerry Byrne to its Advisory Board. Byrne, renowned for his expertise in media, entrepreneurship, and civic leadership, joins the team, bringing with him a vast amount of experience. Having held key positions in various influential media entities, such as Variety, Byrne has been instrumental in steering and broadening their impact.
news.headline: Gerry Byrne joins Academy Securities' Advisory Board. Byrne brings media and entrepreneurship experience.

news.summary: Blue Moon Metals Inc. has received approval from the Bureau of Land Management for a portal and tunnel to facilitate underground mineral exploration at the Blue Moon VMS deposit in Mariposa County, California. This approval, a key milestone for the project development, will enable access for infill and exploration drilling, geology assessment, and future mining operations. The company's stock trades on the TSXV under the symbol MOON and on the OTCQB as BMOOF. The portal and decline structure will serve as the primary haulage route during production. The approval allows for the immediate start of the underground exploration program, marking a significant step forward for Blue Moon.
news.headline: Blue Moon Metals gets BLM approval for underground exploration program in Mariposa County, CA. Important numbers: TSXV: MOON, OTCQB: BMOOF.

news.summary: Serina Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on NYSE American as SER, revealed that Randall Moreadith, M.D., Ph.D., the Chief Development Officer, will disclose fresh insights at the 4th LNP Formulation & Process Development Summit 2025 in Boston, MA. Moreadith's presentation, "The PEG Dilemma – A Solution," is planned for Tuesday, April 15, at 9:30 AM ET. The focus will be on combatting issues linked to anti-PEG antibodies in mRNA vaccines and treatments by proposing Serina's POZ-lipid technology as an immune-silent substitute to PEG-lipids.
news.headline: Serina Therapeutics to discuss immune-silent alternative to PEG in mRNA vaccines at summit in Boston.

news.summary: Legal representatives of the co-founders of the now-closed cryptocurrency mining company HashFlare announced that they were instructed to depart the United States by the Department of Homeland Security.
news.headline: Co-founders of HashFlare ordered by DHS to leave US despite court order in a  case linked to Ponzi scheme.

news.summary: Groupe Dynamite Inc. reported strong growth in Q4 and fiscal 2024. In Q4, revenue increased by 13.1% to $271.8 million, with a 18.8% increase excluding the extra week in 2023. For Fiscal 2024, revenue grew by 19.7% to $958.5 million, with a 21.4% increase excluding the extra week in 2023. Net earnings and adjusted net earnings also saw significant growth. Operating income for Q4 rose by 4.6% to $50.7 million, while adjusted EBITDA increased by 17% to $79.5 million. Fiscal 2024 saw even bigger growth, with operating income up by 46.2% to $212.2 million and adjusted EBITDA up by 39.5% to $303.3 million. The company also announced a share buyback program and plans for future growth, including opening new stores and improving financial metrics. The article details the financial metrics, real estate activities, and future guidance for Fiscal 2025.
news.headline: Groupe Dynamite reports strong Q4 and Fiscal 2024 results, with revenue up 13.1% in Q4 to $271.8M and 19.7% in Fiscal 2024 to $958.5M. Introduces share buyback program.

news.summary: In its latest financial report released on April 15, 2025, The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) highlighted several key achievements. The net interest margin (NIM) saw expansion, while capital and tangible book value (TBV) also experienced noticeable growth. The company successfully maintained strong credit quality metrics. The report indicated significant figures for the first quarter, presented in millions and per share data. This includes data from 1Q25, 4Q24, and 1Q24. Overall, PNC demonstrated positive financial performance and stability in these key areas.
news.headline: PNC Financial Services Group reports $1.5B net income, $3.51 diluted EPS for Q1 2025, growth in NIM and capital.

news.summary: CGI, a leading global IT and business consulting services firm, revealed its plans for expanding the Universal Virtual Flight Data services on April 15, 2025. This move was made public in London and highlighted through stock market symbols GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE. As one of the largest independent firms in its sector, CGI (TSX: GIB.A) (NYSE: GIB) continues to make strides in innovation and growth, solidifying its position in the industry.
news.headline: CGI launches VirtualFlightRecorder for aviation safety; TSX: GIB.A, NYSE: GIB, expansion plans revealed.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Automotive Diagnostic Scan Tools Market Report 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report provides comprehensive insights into the automotive diagnostic scan tools market, encompassing market characteristics, size, growth, segmentation, regional and country breakdowns, competitive landscape, market shares, trends, and strategies. It examines the historical and projected market growth by geography. The market size for automotive diagnostic scan tools is on an upward trajectory, showcasing promising growth prospects.
news.headline: Automotive Diagnostic Scan Tools Market Report 2025 highlights wireless, cloud-based, mobile app integration, real-time remote diagnostics, and blockchain data security trends. Market covers characteristics, growth, segmentation, regional breakdowns, and strategies. Market size has grown significantly.

news.summary: London, Denver, and Johannesburg - AngloGold Ashanti plc ("AngloGold Ashanti", "AGA" or the "Company") has filed its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Tuesday, 15 April 2025. The report includes audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ending on 31 December 2024, as required by Section 203.01 of the NYSE Listed Company Manual.
news.headline: AngloGold Ashanti files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC on April 15, 2025, including financials for year ended Dec 31, 2024.

news.summary: Sobi has scheduled the release of its first-quarter 2025 report on April 29, 2025, at 08:00 CET. An invitation is extended to investors, analysts, and the media for a conference call on the same day, scheduled for 15:30 CET, 14:30 GMT, and 09:30 EST. The call will encompass discussions on the company's performance and key insights.
news.headline: Sobi will release Q1 2025 report on April 29 at 08:00 CET. Conference call at 15:30 CET, 14:30 GMT, 09:30 EST.

news.summary: ColorWorks is revolutionizing private label printing for over 2000 coffee brands. Originating in 2017 as a modest coffee roastery, Temecula Coffee Roasters has expanded to support a boarding school in East Africa. Based in Los Alamitos, California, this family-run business has grown significantly in a short time.
news.headline: Temecula Coffee Roasters uses Epson ColorWorks printers to supply private label coffee for thousands of brands.

news.summary: In New York on April 15, 2025, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) disclosed that on April 10, 2025, they injected $11,199.60 into the Company's Trust Account to prolong the window for finalizing a business merger. This move adds another month, stretching the deadline from April 13, 2025 to May 13, 2025, offering more time to secure a business alliance.
news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited adds $11,199.60 to trust account, extending business combination period by 1 month.
